title: TS6 6TY, Viridor Tees Valley Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AP3627SL/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit notice and decision document for:    Operator name: Viridor Tees Valley Limited   Installation name: Tees Valley Energy Recovery Facility   Permit number: EPR/AP3627SL/A001   "
